name: Golden Autumn Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Butternut squash, diced into 1/2 inch cubes
Chopped chives, grated carrot - for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, melt the butter.
2. Add onion and leeks; cook until soft but not browned.
3. Add potato, carrots, and squash; stir and cook for 2 or 3 minutes.
4. Add stock; cover and simmer about 20 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
5. Puree in a food processor or blender until very smooth. Return to the saucepan.
- The soup can be made ahead and frozen at this point.
6. Stir in cream to desired consistency (up to 3 cups).
7. Add wine if desired.
8. Heat slowly until very hot; do not boil.
9. Season with salt and pepper, then taste.
10. Serve garnished with a sprinkle of chopped chives or green onions and grated carrot.
Makes about 6 servings.
